name: Priya Sharma
title: Senior Frontend Engineer
summary: Passionate frontend engineer with 6 years building scalable SPAs. Led a full React migration at a fintech startup, cutting load times by 40%. Strong focus on performance, accessibility, and design systems.

highlights: Led migration of legacy jQuery app to React + TypeScript, reducing bundle size by 45%
Built a component design system adopted by 4 product teams, eliminating UI inconsistencies
Mentored 2 junior engineers and ran weekly code review sessions
Owned the checkout flow UI handling $2M+ daily transactions
Integrated GraphQL layer replacing 12 REST endpoints, reducing over-fetching by 60%
Improved Lighthouse performance score from 54 to 91
Built responsive marketing sites for 8 clients using React and vanilla CSS
Introduced CSS-in-JS (styled-components) to the team workflow
